rulings.Case Title: DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING, AN VS. JOHN YO WONG, DOING BUSINESS AS BANKER REALTY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday November 23, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT JOHN WONG MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED, no opposition filed. Counsel prepare order. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: ANA VANDERLEY VS. JAMES D KELLY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Authorization For Release Of Medical Records
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday November 23, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT JAMES KELLY, KAREN YOKOO Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Authorization For Release Of Medical Records Hearing Required. Parties to appear at 8:30 a.m. and engage in meaningful meet and confer efforts. Additionally, each party to prepare a proposed form of Protective Order and present it to the Court by 9:15 a.m. in the alternative a joint form of Protective Order may be presented. Parties to report of their progress at 9:30 a.m. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: ELIZABETH COURT, L.P., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. AMANDA SMOCK ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday November 23, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH COURT, L.P., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Affirmative Defenses In First Amended Answer Of Defendants Bellman And Judge OFF CALENDAR, moot. Second Amended Answer filed on November 10, 2016. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: YUE ZHU VS. VERONICA ROCHA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Motion And Motion To Compel The Attendance At Deposition Of Defendant Veronica Rocha And Request For Monetary Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday November 23, 2016, line 4. PLAINTIFF YUE ZHU Notice Of Hearing On Motion And Motion To Compel The Attendance At Deposition Of Defendant Veronica Rocha And Request For Monetary Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities GRANTED. Defendant Veronica Rocha shall appear for deposition on November 29, 2016 (Notice of Entry of this order to be served personally or by overnight mail no later than November 22, 2016). Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,185. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: KIM SMALLWOOD VS. KEVIN SMALLWOOD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday November 23, 2016, line 5. PLAINTIFF KIM SMALLWOOD MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED, subject to opposition. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: JOI NAHIDI VS. CARMELITA MATTHEW ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday November 23, 2016, line 6. DEFENDANT CARMELITA MATTHEW DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, Second Amended Complaint on file. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: KEVIN JIA RONG LAI VS. RONGKANG TAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday November 23, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT YONGLI TAN MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden and produce competent evidence. CCP 2015.5. Additionally, triable issues of fact re: exemption from SFRO. See Plaintiff's Declaration, paragraphs 5,6,8 and 9. =(501/SRB)
